user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Hotel Express Breakfast
fields.description: Quick hotel breakfast with grab-and-go options and a small buffet of hot items. Designed for a fast, convenient meal before an early meeting.

insertion_point.reasoning: Insert at position 0 to place a brief hotel breakfast before the 9:00 AM Client Kickoff Meeting; scheduled 8:00–8:30 AM to allow time to eat and walk to the meeting.
